category_sources: Official ghz documentation has a dedicated Web docs section for ghz-web.
source_facts.description says it is a web interface for ghz.
display_name_sources: Official ghz web documentation uses ghz-web.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README is an official documentation fallback.
Official ghz.sh documentation contains the ghz-web introduction.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/bojand/ghz; per instruction, repo is returned as null and not second-guessed.
tags_sources: Official ghz docs identify ghz as gRPC benchmarking/load testing and include ghz-web docs.
